queries.question: Give me the common transaction types and their dates we have in all bank statements.
queries.sql: SELECT Transactions.TransactionType, Transactions.Date  from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID   GROUP BY Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: For every bank statement, show me the types of transactions along with the dates of them
queries.sql: select bank_statements.accountnumber , transactions.transactiontype , transactions.date from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?transactiontype ?date WHERE {
  ?bank_statements_transactions a :Bank_Statements_Transactions .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasTransactions ?transactions .
  ?bank_statements a :Bank_Statements .
  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?transactions p:TransactionType ?transactiontype .
  ?transactions p:Date ?date .
}

queries.question: What information is there on transactions that are the same in all bank statements?
queries.sql: SELECT Transactions.TransactionID, Transactions.Amount, Transactions.Date  from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID   GROUP BY Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: For all bank statements list every transaction ID.
queries.sql: select bank_statements.accountnumber , transactions.transactionid from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID

  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasTransactions ?transactions .

  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?transactions p:TransactionID ?transactionid .

queries.question: What is the transaction name, id and account number that is in common for all bank statements?
queries.sql: SELECT Transactions.TransactionID, Transactions.AccountNumber, Transactions.TransactionType  from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID   GROUP BY Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: For each bank statement, list information on transactions shown.
queries.sql: select bank_statements.accountnumber , transactions.transactionid , transactions.amount , transactions.date from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?transactionid ?amount ?date WHERE {
  ?bank_statements_transactions a :Bank_Statements_Transactions .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasTransactions ?transactions .

  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?transactions p:TransactionID ?transactionid .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:Date ?date .
}

queries.question: List the transaction IDs in common across all bank statements.
queries.sql: SELECT Transactions.TransactionID  from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID   GROUP BY Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: What is the transaction type, id and account number for each bank statement?
queries.sql: select bank_statements.accountnumber , transactions.transactionid , transactions.accountnumber , transactions.transactiontype from Bank_Statements_Transactions join Transactions on Bank_Statements_Transactions.TransactionID = Transactions.TransactionID join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statements_Transactions.StatementID = Bank_Statements.StatementID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?transactionid ?accountnumber2 ?transactiontype WHERE {
  ?bank_statements_transactions a :Bank_Statements_Transactions .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasTransactions ?transactions .
  ?bank_statements a :Bank_Statements .
  ?bank_statements_transactions p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?transactions p:TransactionID ?transactionid .
  ?transactions p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber2 .
  ?transactions p:TransactionType ?transactiontype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the transaction types and dates we have for each bank statement
Show me information on transactions every bank statement shows.
List the transaction IDs for every bank statement.
What is the transaction type, id and account number for each bank statement?
